checks.message: Unsafe or non-runnable Verify command: npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | grep -q "project-gantt\|projects/\[id\]/page" (contains shell control syntax such as pipes, redirects, semicolons, backticks, or command substitution)
Unsafe or non-runnable Verify command: echo "TypeScript errors found" || echo "TypeScript OK" (contains shell control syntax such as pipes, redirects, semicolons, backticks, or command substitution)
